name: Kilika Cloister of Trials
steps: Enter the Cloister and take the Kilika Sphere from the pedestal on the left.
Place the Kilika Sphere in the slot next to the door — it catches fire. Remove it and carry it to the next chamber.
Insert the Kilika Sphere into the slot on the north wall to reveal a glyph above the shelf. Remove the Kilika Sphere.
Remove the Glyph Sphere from the shelf and set it on one of the side shelves.
Step on the glowing floor switch in the fiery chamber to teleport the pedestal in from the previous room.
Take the Kilika Sphere from the right wall to extinguish the flames. Place it into the pedestal.
Return to the previous chamber and take the Glyph Sphere. Place it in the slot where you found the Kilika Sphere — this puts out the remaining fire and opens a secret chamber.
Push the pedestal (with Kilika Sphere) to the floor switch to drop a section of the platform.
Go downstairs and take the Kilika Sphere from the new slot. Place it into the slot next to the exit — leave it there.
Go back up: retrieve the Destruction Sphere from the secret chamber on the top platform.
Bring the Destruction Sphere downstairs and insert it into the new slot beneath the ledge — a chest appears containing the Red Armlet. Collect it now.
Take the Kilika Sphere from the slot beside the exit and proceed through the door.
